hero.description: 2+ years engineering data pipelines, migrating hundreds of SSRS reports to Databricks, and delivering Power BI dashboards that drive business decisions.

profile.summary: Detail-oriented data analyst with proven expertise in SSRS-to-Databricks migration at scale, Power BI dashboard development, and data validation using Python. Comfortable across the full data stack — from converting T-SQL to Databricks-compatible SQL and configuring ODBC connectors, to deploying DBT models through Azure DevOps CI/CD. Certified Databricks Data Engineer Associate.
